name: The Letter Opener
description: Silver-handled, thin as a whisper. Found in the writing desk, its edge too sharp for correspondence.

name: The Decanter
description: Heavy crystal, still half-full of port. The base is cracked in a shape that tells a story.

name: The Surgical Clamp
description: Cold iron, designed for closure. It was not used for surgery this night.

name: The Rope
description: Jute, salt-stiffened, thirty years old at least. The knot is a sailor's hitch.

name: The Glass Shard
description: Broken from something larger — a mirror, perhaps, or a window that should have stayed closed.

name: The Poisoned Vial
description: A small dark bottle with no label. The residue inside has dried to a crust the colour of old leaves.
